Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-12 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows SII commanding the #1 rank with a dominant score of 93.6, driven by exceptional long-term returns of 894.69% over 10 years and consistent outperformance versus SPY by 659.83% on the same timeframe. SII demonstrates textbook strong momentum with all four moving average filters passing, a "clean" momentum signal of 1.77, and a "strong_buy" flag, though notably it correlates 0.583 with gold (IAU), suggesting sector-specific rather than broad-market strength. In contrast, CLMT exhibits a concerning divergence: while its 5-year return of 573.85% crushes SPY by 499.47%, its 10-year return of 170.04% severely lags SPY, and the ratio_10y_5y metric collapses to 0.3, indicating this momentum may be cyclical rather than secular. Both tickers clear all moving average thresholds and maintain strong near-term ratios, but SII's consistent multi-decade outperformance against CLMT's recent-only strength represents a meaningful structural difference in ranking justification.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
